intro: This archive contains 36 articles from April 12 to April 21, 2026, detailing a range of Microsoft-related security events. The threat actor Storm-2755 was notably active, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2026-33104, CVE-2026-34054, CVE-2026-26179, CVE-2026-32183, and CVE-2026-32201, which carried CVSS scores from 6.5 to 7.8. The reporting covers a severity mix of 4 critical, 18 high, 10 medium, 1 low, and 3 informational items. These incidents impacted multiple, cross-sector organizations, with specific focus on the education, enterprise, and federal government sectors across Global, Canadian, and Japanese regions.
